title: National insertion of targeted advertisment
abstract: Systems and methods are disclosed that allow for providing targeted asset/advertisements for broadcast-wide programming feeds. The systems and methods allow network platforms to select among asset options provided with a content stream and/or replace assets in the content stream. In one arrangement, after selecting an asset, the asset is inserted into the content stream and the content stream is disseminated to subsequent network platforms (e.g., local platforms). At this time, the local platforms may insert local assets into the content stream in predetermined local asset insertion spots.
claims: 1. A method for use in managing asset placement in connection with an addressable asset system, comprising: first receiving, at said asset delivery system, a first content stream including programming and first and second asset delivery opportunities associated with said programming, said first asset delivery opportunity being associated with a local asset delivery opportunity associated with a geographical region, wherein said second asset delivery opportunity is a non-local asset delivery opportunity, said non-local asset delivery opportunity being free from geographical distribution limitations concerning said geographical region; the programming is played for a first portion of time; the first asset delivery opportunity is associated with a second portion of time and the first asset is played for the second portion of time; the second asset delivery opportunity is associated with a third portion of time and the second asset is played for the third portion of time; and the first portion of time, the second portion of time, and the third portion of time do not overlap one another; second receiving, at said asset delivery system, first information concerning who is entitled to select one or more first assets for delivery in said second asset delivery opportunity; identifying said second asset delivery opportunity in said first content stream; based on said first information, identifying said first assets for delivery in said second asset delivery opportunity; and operating said addressable asset system to deliver, to one or more network users, a second content stream including said programming and said first assets in said second asset delivery opportunity.
